subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned toward My countenance! My Pen maketh mention of thee at this moment. Blessed is the servant through whose name the tongue hath been moved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من توجهت الی وجهی یذکرک قلمی فی هذا الحین طوبی لعبد تحرک باسمه لسان
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
